label: Quine — virtual + repeat (parseable)
note: Positive-control quine: uses only virtual, db, load, repeat, if/else if/else. Should fold, highlight, and parse clean.

label: Quine — calminstruction recursion (adversarial)
note: Stress-test quine: CALM parameter sigils (?!n&), take/jno/emit/assemble/stringify, label inside CALM body, recursive self-invocation. Expected to surface ERROR nodes.

label: fasm2 irps.inc (master, remote)
